description: Plausible NEW-period values for the report-regeneration HTML pipeline, keyed to every data-bind in sample-report.html. The template is Q1 2025 (period 2025-Q1); this new data advances it one quarter to Q2 2025 (period 2025-Q2), so downstream stages (rebind, the fidelity harness, and the acceptance test) all share one consistent new dataset. Values are display strings — exactly the form a surgical rebind writes back at the anchor. Regional revenues sum to revenue.total ($5,142,800); regional shares sum to 100.0%.
